Set Acknowledge Code.A: The transmitted transaction set is accepted.
Set Acknowledge Code.E: The transmitted transaction set is accepted, but errors are noted. This means that the sender must not resend this data.
Set Acknowledge Code.R: The transmitted transaction set is rejected. Depending on the error reason, the sender may resend this data.

Transaction Set Note Code.1: This transaction set type is not supported.
Transaction Set Note Code.2: The transaction set trailer is missing.
Transaction Set Note Code.3:
The transaction set control number in the header and trailer do not match.
The value from the header is used in the acknowledgment.
Transaction Set Note Code.4: The number of included segments does not match the actual count.
Transaction Set Note Code.5: One or more segments are in error.

Group Acknowledge Code.A: The transmitted functional group is accepted. An acceptance of a functional group is an acceptance of all transaction sets in that functional group.
Group Acknowledge Code.E: The transmitted functional group is accepted, but errors are noted. This means that the sender must not resend this data.
Group Acknowledge Code.P: Part of the transmitted functional group is accepted by transaction set.
Group Acknowledge Code.R:
The transmitted functional group is rejected. A rejection of a functional group is a rejection of all transaction sets in that functional group.
Depending on the error reason, the sender may resend this data.

Functional Group Note Code.1: This functional group type is not supported.
Functional Group Note Code.2: This version of the functional group is not supported.
Functional Group Note Code.3: The functional group trailer is missing.
Functional Group Note Code.4:
The data interchange control number in the header and trailer do not match.
The value from the header is used in the acknowledgment.
Functional Group Note Code.5: The number of included sets does not match the actual count.

Commodity/Geographic Logical Connector C.-: If one or more segments of a given segment definition contain this element indicating a "-" value, rate application is denied upon satisfaction of any one of these segments, so indicated.
Commodity/Geographic Logical Connector C.-/+: In the event that rate restrictions on two segments of similar definition are satisfied, one segment containing this element indicating a "+" value, and the other segment indicating a "-" value, rate application is denied. In other words, a minus takes precedence over a plus.
Commodity/Geographic Logical Connector C.+: If one or more segments of a given segment definition contain this element indicating a "+" value, rate application requires satisfaction of the restriction stated on at least one of those segments, so indicated.

Amendment Type Code.R: Replace a New Manifest Quantity, Either an Increase or Decrease in the Original Quantity

Amendment Code.10: Inadvertently delivered without customs release. Goods will be redelivered intact or duty and taxes will be paid by carrier.
Amendment Code.11: Overage - Omitted from manifest through clerical error.
Amendment Code.12: Overage - Manifested for discharge at another port and inadvertently discharged at this port.
Amendment Code.13: Proper entry filed or placed in general order per entry or general order number shown in column 2 on reverse.
Amendment Code.14:
Merchandise inadvertently delivered to consignee without customs release.
Merchandise will be redelivered intact or liquidated damages paid.
Amendment Code.15: Merchandise cannot be located and has apparently been lost. Liquidated damages will be paid.
Amendment Code.16: Error in quantity manifested at port of origin. Customs form 5931 will be filed at origin to correct in-bond entry. A copy will be delivered to this port within 90 days or duty and taxes will be paid.
Amendment Code.17: Merchandise removed from original container and re-stuffed prior to moving in-bond.
Amendment Code.01: Not laden aboard per evidence from foreign shipper, or amended bill of lading.
Amendment Code.02: Error in manifesting, not laden on this carrier. Laden on subsequent carrier for transportation to United States, per evidence in files.
Amendment Code.03: Clerical error in manifesting per bill of lading in files.
Amendment Code.04: Pilfered or prematurely landed prior to arrival in United States per signed statement of master or his agent or vessel log extract in our file.
Amendment Code.05: Erroneously duplicated by another bill of lading on the same manifest.
Amendment Code.06: Prematurely landed or overcarried to another United States port where proper disposition was made per evidence in our files.
Amendment Code.07: Inadvertently retained on board and taken foreign per master's or his agent's statement, amended bill of lading, landing certificate, in our files.
Amendment Code.08: Records indicate that this merchandise was not delivered. Inquiries will be made to determine the reason for this discrepancy. Evidence confirming non-importation or other proper disposition will be furnished to customs within 60 days.
Amendment Code.09: Merchandise apparently pilfered on dock while in custody of carrier.

Customs Inhibit/Clearance Code.EC: Shipment is cleared and released by export customs.
Customs Inhibit/Clearance Code.ET: Shipment awaiting timer expiration or positive action for export customs clearance.
Customs Inhibit/Clearance Code.EX: Shipment is inhibited, awaiting export customs release.
Customs Inhibit/Clearance Code.IC: Shipment is cleared and released by import customs.
Customs Inhibit/Clearance Code.IR: Shipment has been released by customs, but import clearance formalities are not yet completed.
Customs Inhibit/Clearance Code.IT: Shipment awaiting timer expiration or positive action for import customs clearance.
Customs Inhibit/Clearance Code.IX: Shipment is inhibited, awaiting import customs release.
Customs Inhibit/Clearance Code.NE: Export customs data not entered or incomplete.
Customs Inhibit/Clearance Code.NI: Import customs data not entered or incomplete.

Alternation Precedence Code.L: A rate with this element indicating a will be applied only in the absence or rate application by any with this element indicating "N" or "S".
Alternation Precedence Code.N: A rate with this element indicating a will be applied to the exclusion of all other rates with this data element indicating other values.
Alternation Precedence Code.S: A rate with this element indicating an will be applied to the exclusion of all other rates except those indicated as "N".

Rate Application Type Code.E: Rate per Unit Applicable only to Units in Excess of a Specific Threshold Amount
Rate Application Type Code.R: Rate per unit subject to minimum units specified, if any

Rate Distribution Code.P: Rate information is private. Intermediaries may distribute it only to participating line haul carriers.
Rate Distribution Code.S: Rate information is selectively private. Intermediaries may distribute it to participating line haul carriers and to other parties specifically identified by name in the docket rate distribution set.

Independence Code.A: Expiration date may be changed at any time.
Independence Code.C: Expiration date may not be changed before the trigger date. It may be changed after the trigger date.
Independence Code.D: Expiration date may be changed at any time. Carrier may change its factor only prior to the trigger date.
Independence Code.E: Expiration date may be changed at any time. Carrier may change its factor only after the trigger date.
Independence Code.G: Expiration date may be changed at any time. Carrier may change its factor only on number of days advance notice as indicated in SS07.
Independence Code.H: Expiration date may be changed only after 30 days advance notice.
